name: Driver Nameplate
description: Driver name above the door — medium size, italic, authoritative but not overbearing. The driver name sits in the secondary hierarchy: readable at close range (pit-lane, TV close-ups) but not fighting the car number for attention. Italic conveys speed without being gimmicky.

overrides.font_family: Brush Script Std, Lucida Handwriting, cursive

notes: Driver name follows car-number color logic — if the number is white, the name matches. Keep font_size at 1/4 to 1/3 of the car number for proper hierarchy. For long surnames, drop to 40px or switch to Oswald condensed.
